description:
Here’s a short guide to starting the process of getting your pet registered as an emotional support animal (ESA)
.
 ESA’s are not service animals — they cannot go into public spaces such as grocery stores, and they do not provide critical disability support — the primary function of an ESA is to provide therapeutic benefits like emotional support, comfort, and companionship that provide relief for certain conditions associated with a person’s mental health. 

This is also a different classificat
title: Registering Your Pet As An ESA | Pet Pointers
